name: Creamy Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, evaporated milk, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (235°F on a candy thermometer).
3. Remove from heat; add peanut butter, marshmallow fluff, butter, and vanilla extract.
4. Stir until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Pour into a large cake pan to cool.
